mano_cua.result_summary: CSS hover 规则明确排除 .ripple 类。选择器为 :is(.wave, .chip, .button, button, nav.tabbed > a, .tabs > a, nav.toolbar > a):not(.slow-ripple, .ripple, .fast-ripple):is(:focus-visible, :hover)::after，使用 :not(.slow-ripple, .ripple, .fast-ripple) 将 ripple 类元素排除在 hover ::after 伪元素效果之外。DevTools 强制 :hover 状态后确认 button.ripple 无任何 hover 视觉变化（无背景色变化、无高亮），而 .wave 类元素有 hover 效果。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: DevTools Styles panel for button.wave does not show a .wave-specific CSS rule at the top (unlike button.ripple which showed .ripple { --_duration: 600ms; }). The .wave class relies on the general hover ::after rule that explicitly excludes .ripple via :not(). Forcing hover on button.wave was attempted before process was killed.
